## 3dslibris 2.7.0

Library folder navigation, continuous D-Pad page turning, and rendering fixes for CSS keyword font sizes.

Notable changes
* Books can now be organized into one level of folders under the configured book directory. The root library shows folders first, then root-level books; opening a folder shows its contents, with `B` or the touch **back** button returning to the root.
* Holding D-Pad Up/Down in reflowable books (EPUB, MOBI, FB2, TXT, RTF, ODT) now repeats page turns automatically after a short delay.

### Improvements

* #41: **first-level folder navigation in the library**: the root library shows folders first, then root-level books; opening a folder shows the books directly inside it; `B` or touch **back** returns to the root library; folder entries skip metadata indexing, cover extraction, TOC resolution, page cache, warmup jobs, and book-open paths; optional sibling folder covers supported via `FolderName.jpg`
* #24: **continuous D-Pad page turning for reflowable books**: holding D-Pad Up/Down repeats previous/next page turns after an initial delay in EPUB, MOBI, FB2, TXT, RTF, and ODT books; fixed-layout documents keep their existing single-step navigation; new general setting to disable Circle Pad page turns for users affected by analog drift

### Fixes

* #98: fix "Clear Cache" not triggering a book re-parse on the next open: after clearing, in-memory pages were reused via the fast path so no new cache was written until restart; fix cancels any pending deferred cache saves before deleting files, then marks layout dirty so all reflowable books re-parse on next open
* #96: fix CSS keyword font sizes in inline `style=` attributes (e.g. `font-size: x-large`) being silently ignored when "Publisher font sizes" is off; keyword sizes are now treated as semantic layout choices like `<big>`/`<small>` and applied in user-size mode, capped to the same ±2× range used by headings

---

## ❤️ Community Shoutouts

3dslibris wouldn't be the same without your support! This version is dedicated to:

* **Library organization and D-Pad repeat:** Thanks to everyone who requested folder support and continuous page turning, and helped validate the browser and reader flows.
* **Fueling the Code:** A special thank you to my **Ko-fi supporters**. Your donations help keep the project going and keep me caffeinated!

*Want to support the project? Consider leaving a ⭐ on GitHub or [buying me a coffee](https://ko-fi.com/rigle)!*

### Included assets

- `3dslibris.cia`
- `3dslibris-debug.cia`
- `3dslibris.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-debug.3dsx`
- `3dslibris-sdmc.zip` (runtime files only; pair it with the `.3dsx` asset for Homebrew Launcher installs)
- `3dslibris-source.tar.gz`
